summary: Reviewed target repo PR #4 for AG Digitalz First Content Sprint v1 and confirmed scope, safety defaults, draft-only content, and target app checks passed.
notes: Target PR #4 was open, unmerged, and mergeable at head SHA 02a749ff3348be9c57f34726f104f381e228b1cd. Changed files were exactly README.md, package.json, index.html, src/main.js, src/styles.css, src/data/templates.js, src/lib/safety.js, and src/lib/status.js. Target checks passed: npm.cmd run check, npm.cmd test, npm.cmd run build, direct draft-only safety assertion, and git diff --check. No target PR merge, deployment, Netlify call, n8n activation, social OAuth, credential, posting, scheduling, DM/comment, analytics API, paid tool, production data, customer data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, Constitution, accepted lesson, or permanent memory action occurred.
